name: 34_Customer_Segmentation_KMeans_CustomerSegmentation_ML
query: Nahitaji kuunda mfumo wa kugawanya wateja kwa kutumia algoriti ya K-means clustering na seti ya data ya Kaggle Customer Segmentation. Anza kwa kusawazisha data katika `src/data_loader.py`, kisha tumia njia ya elbow kubaini idadi bora ya makundi na uhifadhi mchoro wa elbow katika `results/figures/elbow.jpg`. Tekeleza algoriti ya K-means katika `src/model.py`. Hifadhi vituo vya makundi katika `results/metrics/cluster_centers.txt`. Onyesha matokeo ya kugawanya kwa kutumia seaborn na uhifadhi mchoro kama `results/figures/customer_segmentation.png`. Unda dashibodi ya Dash inayoruhusu uchunguzi wa sehemu kwa njia ya mwingiliano.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Kaggle Customer Segmentation" inatumika, ikijumuisha upakiaji na maandalizi ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Data inasawazishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Njia ya elbow inatumika kubaini idadi bora ya makundi. Tafadhali hifadhi mchoro wa elbow katika `results/figures/elbow.jpg`.
Algoriti ya K-means clustering inatekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.
Kugawanya kwa wateja kunaonyeshwa kwa kutumia "seaborn," na mchoro unahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/customer_segmentation.png`.
Dashibodi ya mwingiliano inayoruhusu uchunguzi wa sehemu kwa njia ya mwingiliano inaundwa kwa kutumia "Dash".

preferences.criteria: Mchoro wa elbow unaonyesha wazi jinsi idadi bora ya makundi inavyobainishwa.
Mfumo unadhibiti vizuri uzinduzi na kumalizika kwa dashibodi.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Kaggle Customer Segmentation" inatumika, ikijumuisha upakiaji na maandalizi ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not actually implement loading or preparation of the "Kaggle Customer Segmentation" dataset. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation with a `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` — no actual data loading, no file reading, no pandas/CSV operations, and no real dataset processing. The file merely lists the requirement criteria as strings and simulates compliance without fulfilling it. There is no evidence of actual dataset loading or preparation logic.

judge_stats.criteria: Data inasawazishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not contain any actual data standardization implementation. Instead, it only contains a placeholder function `load_dataset()` that returns a dictionary with a string "loaded" and some notes, and a `build_transforms()` function that returns a list of strings. There is no real standardization code (e.g., using `StandardScaler`, `MinMaxScaler`, or any normalization logic from libraries like `sklearn.preprocessing`). The file is explicitly described as a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — meaning it is a stub, not a functional implementation. The requirement that data be standardized to ensure feature values are within the same range is not met.

judge_stats.criteria: Njia ya elbow inatumika kubaini idadi bora ya makundi. Tafadhali hifadhi mchoro wa elbow katika `results/figures/elbow.jpg`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Ingawa faili `results/figures/elbow.jpg` ipo katika muundo wa mradi, haiwezekani kuthibitisha maudhui yake kwa sababu jaribio la kusoma picha lilishindwa na hitilafu ("Could not process image"). Zaidi ya hayo, trajectory haikuonyesha hatua wazi za utekelezaji wa njia ya elbow (kuhesabu inertia/WCSS kwa idadi tofauti za makundi) wala uhifadhi wa mchoro huo. Kwa hivyo, haiwezekani kuthibitisha kwamba mchoro wa elbow ulioundwa na kuhifadhiwa kwa usahihi katika `results/figures/elbow.jpg`.

judge_stats.criteria: Algoriti ya K-means clustering inatekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not contain any actual K-means clustering implementation. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub with metadata strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS`) and a `build_model()` function that returns a string placeholder. There is no import of any clustering library (e.g., `sklearn.cluster.KMeans`), no data fitting, no cluster assignment logic, and no actual algorithmic implementation of K-means whatsoever.

<UNSATISFIED>: Faili `results/metrics/cluster_centers.txt` ipo katika muundo wa mradi, lakini maudhui yake ni `('placeholder\r\n', None)` - ambayo ni thamani ya "placeholder" tu, si vituo halisi vya makundi (cluster centers) kutoka kwa mfano wa KMeans. Hii inaonyesha kwamba faili iliundwa lakini haikujazwa na data halisi ya vituo vya makundi.

judge_stats.criteria: Kugawanya kwa wateja kunaonyeshwa kwa kutumia "seaborn," na mchoro unahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/customer_segmentation.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/figures/customer_segmentation.png` exists in the workspace, but there is no evidence that it was created using **seaborn**. The trajectory analysis explicitly states that no steps were recorded involving the use of the `seaborn` library for this plot. Additionally, the image file itself could not be read/verified due to an error (BadRequestError). Therefore, the requirement that customer segmentation be visualized specifically using seaborn cannot be confirmed as satisfied.

judge_stats.criteria: Dashibodi ya mwingiliano inayoruhusu uchunguzi wa sehemu kwa njia ya mwingiliano inaundwa kwa kutumia "Dash".

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Hakuna ushahidi wowote wa utekelezaji wa dashibodi ya mwingiliano kwa kutumia "Dash". Muundo wa mradi unaonyesha faili mbili tu (`src/data_loader.py` na `src/model.py`), ambazo zote ni "minimal semantic implementation placeholders" na hazina msimbo wowote unaohusiana na Dash. Hakuna faili ya dashibodi (kama `dashboard.py` au sawa nayo), na trajectory inathibitisha kwamba hakuna hatua zilizotekelezwa zinazohusiana na Dash au uchunguzi wa sehemu kwa njia ya mwingiliano.
